action.text: Notwithstanding passage of S.Res. 708 and the adoption of amendment SA 5442 to S.Res. 708, the amendment SA 5442 is modified with the technical correction at the desk and is agreed to, as modified, by Unanimous Consent.

vote.text: Amendment SA 5442 agreed to in Senate by Unanimous Consent.

action.text: Amendment SA 5442 proposed by Senator Moreno for Senator Padilla.
Senate amendment agreed to: Amendment SA 5442 agreed to in Senate by Unanimous Consent.
Senate amendment proposed (on the floor): Amendment SA 5442 proposed by Senator Moreno for Senator Padilla.
